title: macroplectrum calceolus
intro: Macroplectrum calceolus, also known as the yellow gentian or little yellow gentian, is a flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Macroplectrum calceolus include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots and leaves are often used in traditional medicine.
